column1: #  Controls which alerts are IGNORED, WARN, or FAIL
# ── Ignore false positives for static S3/CloudFront sites ──────────────────────
# "Cookie No HttpOnly Flag" — CloudFront session cookies, not our code
# "Private IP Disclosure" — AWS internal IPs sometimes appear in headers
# ── Downgrade to WARN (informational — fix eventually but don't block) ──────────
# "X-Content-Type-Options Header Missing" — add via CloudFront response headers policy
# "Content Security Policy (CSP) Header Not Set" — complex to implement for Jekyll
# ── FAIL the build on these (genuine security issues) ───────────────────────────
# "Cross-Site Scripting" — should never appear on a static site
# "SQL Injection" — should never appear on a static site
